meta.source: U.S. Census Bureau, ACS 2019-2023 5-year — effective property tax rate = median real estate taxes paid (B25103) / median home value (B25077). ZIP-county crosswalk: Census 2020 ZCTA-County relationship file.
meta.method: ZIP -> clean ZCTA effective rate; else primary county rate (highest-tax counties use a top-code floor); else state; else 1.0% default. Estimate for quoting; actual set by the assessor.
